comments.author: @SilentWanderYT-TV
comments.text: What a stunning and thought-provoking documentary! Thank you for sharing such a unique perspective on the Faroe Islands. Looking forward to more explorations!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: @SilentWanderYT-TV We are so glad you enjoyed the documentary! The Faroe Islands are truly a unique place, and we're happy we could share that perspective with you. Thanks for watching!

comments.author: @jafribasron1519
comments.text:
Entry to Faroe Island require VISA ??
Im holding Singapore passport. 
The No.2 most valuable and respected passport in the world 🌍.

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@jafribasron1519 
Thank you for watching! Good news: As a Singaporean passport holder, you do not need a visa to visit the Faroe Islands for short stays (up to 90 days). With such a powerful passport, your entry process should be very straightforward. Safe travels!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@BeyondBordersTravel-i6
Thank you! It truly is a remarkably peaceful place to experience firsthand.

comments.author: @NguoiVietSongXaQue
comments.text: Such a brilliant video with an incredible production quality. The story is highly engaging and leaves a lasting impression. Keep creating this wonderful work!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: Thank you so much for the kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that the story and production quality resonated with you. It means a lot to our team to know this journey left an impression. More documentaries are on the way—stay tuned!
